features: [Compatibility]The screen protective film designed compatible for Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 44mm,samsung watch8 44mm screen protector it can perfectly cover the screen of the watch,This samsung galaxy watch8 44mm screen protector saver perfectly matches the original screen. Maximum protection against scratches, scratches and bumps, *Please check your device model before buying Only for Galaxy watch 8 44mm*.

[High Quality Materials]This samsung galaxy watch 8 screen protector made from ultra-thin high-performance composite. Compatible with Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 44mm tempered glass 9H hardness tempered glass,galaxy 8 watch 44mm use Precise laser cutting size provides maximum protection for the entire touchscreen surface of your watch.

[High Durability] Top quality tempered glass screen protector,This galaxy watch8 screen protector 44mm It is resistant to shattering or splintering,scratches,other accidents, safety performance to withstand the vibrations of everyday life and samsung watch 8 44mm screen protector HD transparent screen is still the original viewing experience Not fragile, explosion-proof, scratch-proof, fingerprint-proof, bubble-free,hydrophobic and oleophobic.

[Clear Sensitive] Compatible with Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 44mm tempered glass use the latest highly responsive touch technology,perfectly supports fingerprint reader,ultra-transparent and ultra-sensitive tempered glass ensures the high definition and sensitivity of the touch screen and restores the touch of bare metal for your Samsung Watch8 series,allows you to accurately feedback every touch and achieve zero delay response of the phone.

[Easy To Install] Kit Contains-4 packs for Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 44mm Glass screen protector,1 suction cup,4 packs of dry alcohol pads, and 4 packs of wet alcohol pads. Remove dust before actual installation and install according to the instructions correctly, Simply wipe thoroughly during application on.
